assertions.text: Orchestrates the five concerns in order: SimonK-stack pull, wiki pull, /gstack-upgrade, five vendored /*-upgrade siblings, scripts/install.sh --force
Prints a per-step summary with commits-pulled counts and a final state report
Treats this as a holistic refresh (more than just gstack), best-effort per step
A gstack-only request routes to /gstack-upgrade, not this holistic skill
